1.6K2X.desc: 2-Way Speaker System featuring a 6.5"/165 mm paper cone woofer and 1"/25 mm silk dome tweeter with a 12 dB tweeter crossover. Designed for easy installation in factory housings with a mounting depth of just 59 mm.
narr: Main Features
6.5"/165 mm paper cone woofer with Y-25 ferrite magnet and 25.5 mm voice coil
1"/25 mm silk dome tweeter with N-35 neodymium magnet for smooth, natural high-frequency reproduction
12 dB tweeter crossover included for easy two-way system integration
Extremely shallow 59 mm mounting depth for installation in original vehicle speaker housings

1.6C.desc: 6.5"/165 mm coaxial speaker combining a 6.5"/165 mm paper cone woofer with a 0.8"/20 mm silk dome tweeter in a single unit. Built for straightforward factory-location replacement with minimal mounting depth.
narr: Main Features
6.5"/165 mm paper cone woofer with Y-25 ferrite magnet and 25.5 mm voice coil
0.8"/20 mm silk dome tweeter with N-35 neodymium magnet integrated coaxially
Single-unit coaxial design for simple factory-location installation
Shallow mounting depth for compatibility with original vehicle speaker housings

3.165.desc: 6.5"/165 mm mid-woofer with a pressed paper cone, waterproof treatment, and a high-performance Y-35 grade ferrite magnet motor for use in 2-way and 3-way component systems.
narr: Main Features
Pressed paper cone with waterproof treatment — ideal marriage of lightness, stiffness, and damping
Y-35 grade ferrite magnet motor with significantly higher performance than standard magnets
Aluminum voice coil support with double-layer copper wire for thermal dissipation and extended response
Perbunan® rubber surround stable across a wide temperature range
ABS/fiberglass basket engineered for torsional rigidity and ventilation

3.UMA.desc: 2-Way Mid-High Unit combining a 1"/25 mm tweeter and a 3.65 midrange in a single assembly, concentrating midrange and tweeter emissions in a virtual point to minimize phase delays at the crossover.
narr: Main Features
Concentrated emission point — tweeter and midrange co-located to minimize phase delays
1"/25 mm silk dome tweeter with neodymium magnet
3.65 midrange driver with CNC aluminum center plug for high-frequency extension
Designed for 3-way systems pairing with a 3.165 woofer

3.90.desc: 3.5"/90 mm cone midrange designed for use in 3-way component systems, delivering accurate midrange reproduction with controlled bandwidth.
narr: Main Features
3.5"/90 mm cone midrange for 3-way component system use
Y-35 ferrite magnet motor for high magnetic performance
ABS/fiberglass basket for torsional rigidity
Perbunan® rubber surround for high damping

3.65.desc: 2.5"/65 mm cone widerange speaker built for exceptional transient response and linearity in 3-way systems or as a tweeter replacement in 2-way systems. The CNC aluminum center plug extends high-frequency reproduction beyond 20 kHz.
narr: Main Features
CNC aluminum center plug for linearization and high-frequency extension beyond 20 KHz
20 mm voice coil with reduced mass for fast transient response
Functions in a 3-way system or as a tweeter replacement in a 2-way system
Exceptional transient response and outstanding linearity

3.28.desc: 1.1"/28 mm silk dome tweeter with an oversized voice coil ventilated and damped with iron-fluid oil, delivering smooth, extended high-frequency reproduction for component speaker systems.
narr: Main Features
1.1"/28 mm silk-impregnated fabric dome for smooth, natural sound
Oversized voice coil ventilated and damped with iron-fluid oil for power handling and low distortion
Supplied with accessories for flexible installation options

3.25.desc: 1"/25 mm silk dome tweeter with a neodymium magnet, designed for 2-way speaker systems and included in the 3.6K2X system with an inline 12 dB crossover.
narr: Main Features
1"/25 mm silk dome tweeter with neodymium magnet
Inline 12 dB crossover included when used in the 3.6K2X system
Accessories included for flexible installation options

3.69.desc: 6x9"/150×230 mm cone woofer for use in 2-way component systems, featuring a high-performance Y-35 ferrite magnet motor and pressed paper cone with waterproof treatment.
narr: Main Features
6x9"/150×230 mm cone woofer for 2-way component system use
Y-35 grade ferrite magnet motor for high performance
Pressed paper cone with waterproof treatment
Perbunan® rubber surround stable across extreme temperatures

3.6C.desc: 6.5"/165 mm coaxial speaker combining woofer and tweeter in a single unit, delivering full-range response from 65 Hz to 20 KHz for straightforward factory-location installation.
narr: Main Features
6.5"/165 mm coaxial design — woofer and tweeter in a single unit
Y-35 ferrite magnet motor on woofer
Pressed paper cone with waterproof treatment
Full-range 65 Hz – 20 KHz response

3.10D4.desc: 10"/250 mm dual voice coil subwoofer with 4+4 Ω impedance, featuring a 4-layer DVC on a Kapton® support, high-grade Y30 ferrite magnet, Conex® spider, and treated cellulose pulp cone for deep, controlled bass.
narr: Main Features
10"/250 mm DVC 4+4 Ω subwoofer with 4-layer dual voice coil on Kapton® support
High grade Y30 ferrite magnet for consistent magnetic performance
Conex® spider for controlled, linear excursion
Treated cellulose pulp cone for rigidity and damping

3.10D2.desc: 10"/250 mm dual voice coil subwoofer with 2+2 Ω impedance, featuring a 4-layer DVC on a Kapton® support, high-grade Y30 ferrite magnet, Conex® spider, and treated cellulose pulp cone for deep, controlled bass.
narr: Main Features
10"/250 mm DVC 2+2 Ω subwoofer with 4-layer dual voice coil on Kapton® support
High grade Y30 ferrite magnet for consistent magnetic performance
Conex® spider for controlled, linear excursion
Treated cellulose pulp cone for rigidity and damping

3.WB6.desc: 6.5"/165 mm ultra-compact active ported subwoofer with a built-in 500 W high-current Class-D amplifier and a fiberglass/paper cone in an enclosure only 15 cm deep.
narr: Main Features
Ultra-compact design — only 15 cm deep enclosure
Built-in 500 W high-current Class-D amplifier
6.5"/165 mm fiberglass/paper cone with ferrite magnet
Ported enclosure: 400(W) × 250(H) × 150(D) mm

3.WB8.desc: 8"/200 mm ultra-compact active ported subwoofer with a built-in 600 W high-current Class-D amplifier and a fiberglass/paper cone in an enclosure only 15 cm deep.

Ultra-compact design — only 15 cm deep enclosure
Built-in 600 W high-current Class-D amplifier
8"/200 mm fiberglass/paper cone with ferrite magnet
Ported enclosure: 448(W) × 289(H) × 150(D) mm

3.6K2CX.desc: 2-Way passive crossover for use with the 3.165 woofer and 3.28 tweeter, featuring oversized ceramic resistors, a polyester tweeter capacitor, and 4-step tweeter level adjustment.
narr: Main Features
Oversized ceramic resistors for high power handling without saturation
Polyester tweeter capacitor for accurate crossover filtering
4-step tweeter level adjustment for system tuning flexibility

3.6K3CX.desc: 3-Way passive crossover with 4-step tweeter/midrange level adjustment and phase adjustment switches, using oversized ceramic resistors and a polyester tweeter capacitor.
narr: Main Features
Oversized ceramic resistors for high power handling
Polyester tweeter capacitor for accurate filtering
4-step tweeter/midrange level adjustment
Phase tweeter/midrange adjustment

3.6K3HECX.desc: 3-Way High-End passive crossover featuring a premium aluminum-foil Alu E-Cap capacitor for the midrange, oversized ceramic resistors, 4-step level adjustment for tweeter and midrange, and phase switches.
narr: Main Features
High-End Alu E-Cap (aluminum foil capacitor) — faster-reacting than electrolytic capacitors
Oversized ceramic resistors for robust power handling
4-step tweeter/midrange level adjustment
Phase tweeter/midrange adjustment

4.28.desc: 1.1"/28 mm Sonatex silk dome tweeter with a high-grade N52 neodymium magnet and CNC-machined aluminum alloy flush-mount flange, delivering extraordinary efficiency and controlled high-frequency reproduction.
narr: Main Features
Sonatex™ polymer-laminated silk dome with catenary curvature for wide dispersion
High-grade N-52 neodymium magnet — over 25% stronger than common N-48 magnets
Large copper-clad aluminum (CCAC) vented voice coil for heat dissipation and extended response
CNC-machined pole plate for maximum magnetic flux
Deluxe stainless-steel grille calibrated as an acoustic lens

4.75.desc: 3"/75 mm cone midrange with a long-fiber paper cone, die-cast aluminum alloy basket, and high-grade N52 neodymium magnet, delivering high efficiency for high SPL even with low-power factory amplifiers.
narr: Main Features
High-grade N-52 neodymium magnet for high energy and efficiency
Long-fiber, unbleached pulp cone with special external treatment
Die-cast aluminum alloy basket for rigidity and minimal airflow resistance
Large CCAC vented voice coil for power handling and heat dissipation

4.100.desc: 4"/100 mm cone midrange with a long-fiber paper cone, die-cast aluminum alloy basket, high-grade N52 neodymium magnet, and a deluxe stainless-steel grille included.
narr: Main Features
High-grade N52 neodymium magnet for high efficiency
Long-fiber paper cone midrange for lightness, rigidity, and damping
Die-cast aluminum alloy basket for rigidity and airflow efficiency
Deluxe protective stainless-steel grille included

4.165.desc: 6.5"/165 mm mid-woofer with a long-fiber unbleached pulp cone, die-cast aluminum alloy basket, Y35 ferrite magnet, and large CCAC vented voice coil, engineered to push the limits of cost vs. performance.
narr: Main Features
Long-fiber, unbleached pulp cone with special external treatment
Oversized Y-35 ferrite magnet for clean excursion peaks at high power
Die-cast aluminum alloy basket for rigidity and minimal airflow resistance
Large CCAC vented voice coil for power handling, low mass, and heat dissipation
Soft nitrile rubber surround — UV-resistant and temperature-stable

4.6C.desc: 6.5"/165 mm coaxial speaker combining a Sonatex silk dome tweeter with a long-fiber pulp cone woofer, Y35 ferrite magnet, and die-cast aluminum alloy basket in a single unit.
narr: Main Features
Sonatex silk dome tweeter for smooth, linear, extended response
Long-fiber, unbleached pulp cone woofer with special external treatment
Oversized Y-35 ferrite magnet for surplus energy at high excursions
Die-cast aluminum alloy basket for rigidity
Soft nitrile rubber surround — UV-resistant and temperature-stable

4.UMA.desc: 2-Way Mid-High Unit combining the 4.28 Sonatex silk dome tweeter and 4.75 long-fiber paper cone midrange in a single injected-ABS twin frame, placing both drivers in a virtually unified emission point for phase-coherent installation.
narr: Main Features
Injected ABS twin frame — places midrange and tweeter in a single virtual point, eliminating phase problems
4.28 Sonatex silk dome tweeter with N52 neodymium magnet
4.75 long-fiber paper cone midrange with N52 neodymium magnet
Deluxe protective stainless-steel grille included

4.6K2CX.desc: 2-Way passive crossover for use with the 4.165 woofer and 4.28 tweeter, featuring oversized non-inductive resistors, Mylar dielectric capacitors, and a 2-step tweeter level adjustment.
narr: Main Features
Oversized non-inductive resistors for high power handling
Mylar dielectric capacitors for accurate filtering
2-step tweeter level adjustment (0/−3 dB)
12 dB/Oct Butterworth LP and HP slopes

4.6K3CX.desc: 3-Way passive crossover for the 4.165 woofer, 4.75 or 4.UMA midrange, and 4.28 or 4.UMA tweeter, with 2-step level switches for both tweeter and midrange.
narr: Main Features
Oversized non-inductive resistors for high power handling
Mylar dielectric capacitors for accurate filtering
2-step tweeter and midrange level adjustment (0/−3 dB each)
12 dB/Oct Butterworth LP/HP, 6 dB/Oct BP slopes

MBFRONT100.desc: The MB Front 100 is a plug-and-play 2-way front speaker system engineered specifically for many Mercedes-Benz vehicles, pairing a 4"/100 mm carbon fiber woofer with a 1"/25 mm silk dome tweeter and a dedicated crossover.
narr: Main Features
Neodymium magnet ensures greater efficiency and improves linearity along the voice coil's excursion
Carbon fiber cone delivers extraordinary rigidity with very low weight for high transient dynamics
25 mm silk dome tweeter for a smooth, linear, very extended high-frequency response
Plug & Play — special adaptor fits many Mercedes-Benz vehicles with no modifications

MBCOAX100.desc: The MB Coax 100 integrates a 4"/100 mm carbon fiber woofer and a 0.6"/16 mm silk dome tweeter into a single coaxial speaker with dedicated crossover, designed for seamless Mercedes-Benz fitment alongside the MB Sub 200.
narr: Main Features
16 mm silk dome tweeter for smooth, linear, very extended high-frequency response
Carbon fiber cone for extraordinary rigidity with very low weight
High rigidity ABS basket with interlocking brackets for effortless installation
Neodymium magnet for greater efficiency and linearity

MBSUB200.desc: The MB Sub 200 is an 8"/200 mm subwoofer system with dual vented neodymium magnets and a carbon fiber cone, supplied with left- and right-side adaptors for direct Mercedes-Benz integration.
narr: Main Features
Dual vented neodymium magnet for greater efficiency and linearity along the excursion
Large diameter aluminum voice coil vented through radial holes for superior thermal management
Carbon fiber cone for extraordinary rigidity with very low weight
Supplied with left and right adaptors for installation in many Mercedes-Benz without modification

intro: The 1000 Series was conceived to offer ESB sound in low-cost speakers without sacrificing quality. The woofer's pressed paper cone, large voice coils for high power, and silk dome tweeters with neodymium magnets are just some of the features that make these speakers uncompromising.

Each system is designed to be easily installed in a vehicle's original speaker housings and integrated with a factory head unit or an aftermarket amplifier, whether the vehicle uses coaxial or two-way speaker systems. Particular attention was given to mounting depth, which at just 59 mm is among the shallowest on the market today.
The ESB 3000 speaker system was developed and assembled with a great commitment to the research of materials and engineering solutions of the highest level.

The baskets are engineered for maximum torsional rigidity. The cones use pressed paper with a waterproof treatment — an ideal marriage of lightness, stiffness, and damping. All woofers use a Y-35 grade ferrite magnet motor with significantly higher performance than classic magnets, while the tweeters use a silk-impregnated fabric dome with oversized voice coils ventilated and damped with iron-fluid oil.

ESB's goal for its 4000 Series was to push the limits of cost vs. performance. The expensive design of the 3"/75 mm midrange driver and its high-grade neodymium magnet guarantees a level of efficiency that supports high sound pressure even when paired with low-power factory amplifiers.

Even the 4000 Series' premium matt-black steel grilles lend a refined aesthetic on par with more expensive systems. With ESB's 4000 Series, never has such quality, clarity, and accuracy been more affordable.

The mission of this project was to create a loudspeaker system with extremely high transient response, for music reproduction with more realistic impact and involvement. The main goal was to reduce moving masses, making the mobile part of the loudspeaker lighter and faster.

Great attention was paid to axial and radial ventilation of the voice coil. Metal parts are CNC machined for maximum magnetic flux linearity and minimum loss. The carbon-fiber-reinforced composite cone/dome ensures extraordinary rigidity combined with very low weight.

The 8000 Series can be considered the direct heir to the 7000 Series. The goal was to renew an already-exceptional range of speakers with the latest technologies and the best materials available today, always with installation versatility in mind.

Every detail was treated with the utmost care — from the choice of materials, forms, construction, and finishing of the baskets to the ventilation systems of the magnets and voice coils. We have improved what was thought difficult to improve, laying the foundation for a new series of exceptional car speakers.

The new speakers dedicated to Mercedes-Benz vehicles join the CS series, specially engineered to elevate sound performance to a completely new level — higher quality with better efficiency than the originals, with neodymium magnets, special voice coils, and a new high-performance motor in relation to the reduced space required.

These speakers are designed to integrate easily into many Mercedes-Benz vehicles without modifications. They have a shallow depth and include special adapters to match car spaces exactly, with connectors that match the car's original wiring for ultimate plug-and-play convenience.
